name: Cucumber Cool Down
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely Chopped Cucumber (Peeled, if desired)
2 tbsp Chopped Fresh Mint or Parsley (or 1 tbsp Dried Mint or Parsley)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the yogurt and finely chopped cucumber.
2. Add the chopped fresh mint or parsley (or dried version).
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
NOTE: This refreshing dip pairs well with almost any spicy dish. Serve over the top of dishes or on the side for dipping.
